text:
APETITAN is the 2nd track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack. As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

"Ape Titan" is a reference to Zeke Jaeger's Beast Titan.

Musical motifs

The track has 4 remixes:

AOTs2M他3 (0:00-1:21)
[[Before Lights Out|SymphonicSuite[AoT]Part2-3rd:Before Lights Out]]
tooth-i: (the only version that does not feature the verse)
Before Lights Out (Instrumental)
The track is split into 2 parts. The first part (0:00-2:33) is just a faster version of the second (2:33-5:28).
